name: Mocha Rice Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Scald milk in the top of a double boiler.
2. Add coffee and blend thoroughly.
3. Add chocolate, stirring until completely melted.
4. Add sugar and salt, then mix well.
5. Gradually add some of this hot mixture to the beaten egg.
6. Return the mixture to the double boiler and cook for 5 minutes.
7. Stir in rice and let it cool.
8. Whip cream until stiff.
9. Gently fold in raisins, walnuts, and whipped cream into the rice mixture.
10. Chill well in individual sherbet glasses.
Serves 8.
